## Required Verification

- [ ] `npm run verify` passes locally.
- [ ] New public routes are registered or intentionally excluded.
- [ ] New indexable pages include canonical metadata and internal links.
- [ ] New commercial pages include disclosure-safe affiliate behavior.
- [ ] Beauty claims avoid unsupported efficacy, safety, medical, pregnancy-safe, non-toxic, dermatologist, or guaranteed-result language.
- [ ] Structured data matches visible page content and avoids unsupported Product, Offer, Review, price, availability, or rating schema.
- [ ] Screenshots or visual notes added for meaningful UI changes.
